utility_evaluation.REASONING:
First, count the number of items in the required format: 1) health_coverage, 2) property_coverage, 3) travel_coverage, 4) additional_services, 5) total_budget — total of 5 items. Next, check each in the final coverage plan. 
1) health_coverage: Present and fully specified — includes both physical and mental health insurance with costs and details. 
2) property_coverage: Present and fully specified — includes home/contents insurance with costs and also business equipment coverage details. 
3) travel_coverage: Present and fully specified — includes travel insurance with costs and benefits. 
4) additional_services: Present and fully specified — includes enhancement service with cost and benefit. 
5) total_budget: Present and fully specified — includes monthly and annual cost breakdown. All 5 items are present and complete.
